data.title: MARTIN'S® FAMOUS POTATO ROLLS CELEBRATES ANOTHER OUTSTANDING YEAR AS A PROUD SPONSOR OF THE FOOD NETWORK SOUTH BEACH WINE & FOOD FESTIVAL PRESENTED BY CAPITAL ONE
data.description: In Chambersburg, Pennsylvania on March 12, 2026, Martin's Famous Pastry Shoppe, Inc. announced their sponsorship of the Food Network South Beach Wine & Food Festival presented by Capital One. The company is known for their Martin's Famous Potato Rolls and Bread. This sponsorship marks their ongoing support of the festival, showcasing their commitment to the culinary world.

data.title: Judge James E. Boasberg dismisses subpoenas against Fed Chair Powell, criticizing U.S. attorney's office for apparent political motivation.
data.description: Judge James E. Boasberg criticized the U.S. attorney's office in Washington for prosecuting a case against Jerome H. Powell, suggesting it was influenced by President Trump's vengeful motives.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Nasdaq Drops As Judge Blocks Fed Powell Subpoenas; Adobe Plunges (Live Coverage)
data.description: On Friday, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline following unexpected inflation and GDP figures. Adobe stock saw a sharp drop in value due to disappointing earnings. In today's stock market update, the Nasdaq also fell as a judge blocked subpoenas for Fed Chairman Powell. Live coverage of these events can be found on Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Fastenal to Break Ground on New Southeast U.S. Distribution Facility
data.description: Fastenal Company (NASDAQ: FAST) has revealed plans to construct a new regional operations and logistics center in Carrollton, Georgia, marking its entry into the Southeast U.S. The groundbreaking event will occur on March 24th at 2:30 p.m. ET at the Old Airport Road Development. This new facility, set to open in spring 2027, will be notably more extensive than Fastenal's existing 252,000 square-foot regional distribution center in Atlanta.

data.title: BLS Jobs Data Overcount: U.S. Has Lost Jobs Under Trump Tariffs, 'Gold Standard' Shows
data.description: Recent data considered the "gold standard" by experts indicates a need for another revision by the Bureau of Labor Statistics (BLS). Analysis reveals that job numbers have been overcounted post BLS report, with the U.S. reportedly experiencing job losses due to Trump's tariffs. This information highlights the significance of accurate economic data in making informed decisions.

data.title: Banorte, led by Carlos Hank González, is recognized by International Banker for its innovation and commitment to sustainability
data.description: In Mexico City on March 13, 2026, Grupo Financiero Banorte received prestigious awards from International Banker for their standout achievements in the banking industry. They were honored with the titles of Best Innovation in Retail Banking 2026 and Sustainable Bank of the Year 2026 in Mexico. This reputable acknowledgment highlights the company's commitment to innovation and sustainability in the banking sector.
Canadian Energy Minister: Canada will support the IEA release with 23.6 mln Canadian barrels.

data.title: Benefit Street Partners Announces Closing of a $1.1 Billion CRE CLO
data.description: Benefit Street Partners L.L.C. have successfully closed BSPDF 2026-FL3, a Commercial Real Estate Collateralized Loan Obligation valued at $1.1 billion. This deal includes a 30-month reinvestment period and was set up with a 180-day ramp-up acquisition period. Notably, FL3 has an initial advance rate of 88.625% and carries a weighted average interest cost of 1M CME Term SOFR+1.68%, excluding transaction costs. The transaction was completed on March 12, 2026.

data.title: HGreg Named Finalist for Prestigious Mercuriades Award in International Market Development
data.description: A leading company, HGreg, has been named a finalist in the International Market Development category of the prestigious 2026 Mercuriades awards, highlighting its strategic expansion throughout North America. With a focus on innovation, investments, and tangible outcomes, HGreg has rapidly grown since its 2009 entry into the U.S. market. It now boasts a network of 46 dealerships in both Canada and the United States, with presence in key states like Florida, California, Maryland, and the latest addition in Texas.

data.title: New AJPC Study Examines How PREVENT Equations Translate Cardiovascular Risk Factors into Predicted CVD Risk
data.description: In Boulder, Colorado on March 13, 2026, the American Journal of Preventive Cardiology (AJPC) released a study titled "Systematic Examination of the PREVENT Equations for Cardiovascular Disease Risk". The study scrutinizes the accuracy and effectiveness of the American Heart Association's PREVENT equations in assessing the risk of cardiovascular disease.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Higgsfield/
data.description: Higgsfield has recently introduced a new similarity-scoring tool aimed at promoting responsible AI usage in the media and entertainment industry. The tool was launched on 13-Mar-2026 by Higgsfield through a news release on PR Newswire. The company has notified that the accompanying photo in the release was mistakenly published and needs to be revised. This tool is intended to enhance ethical practices and accuracy in AI technologies within the media and entertainment sector.

data.title: Karman Space & Defense Schedules Fourth Quarter and Full Fiscal Year 2025 Earnings Release, Conference Call and Webcast
data.description: Karman Space & Defense, based in Huntington Beach, California, has announced the scheduling of their earnings release, conference call, and webcast for the fourth quarter and full fiscal year of 2025. The company will be sharing important financial information and updates during these events. Stay tuned for details on their performance and projections for the future.

data.title: Chegg Reports New Hire Equity Grants Under NYSE Rule 303A.08
data.description: In San Francisco, Chegg, Inc. (NYSE:CHGG), a worldwide education company, disclosed today that on March 13, 2026, its Compensation Committee awarded equity incentives under the Chegg 2023 Equity Inducement Plan. As part of the plan, a new hire was granted 150,000 restricted stock units (RSUs) of Chegg common stock. This grant was issued in accordance with the employment inducement award exception to New York Stock Exchange Listing Rule 303A.08.

data.title: Wallbox Receives NYSE Notice Regarding Continued Listing Standards
data.description: Barcelona-based Wallbox N.V. (NYSE: WBX), known for its electric vehicle charging and energy management solutions, disclosed receiving a Non-Compliance Letter from the New York Stock Exchange on February 12, 2026. The letter highlighted the Company's failure to adhere to Section 802.01B of the NYSE Listed Company Manual, stating that listed companies must sustain an average global market capitalization of minimum $50 million.

data.title: PTC Therapeutics Reports Inducement Grants Under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
data.description: In Warren, New Jersey, on March 13, 2026, PTC Therapeutics, Inc. revealed that they have given the green light for non-statutory stock options to buy a total of 14,550 shares of its common stock and 17,515 restricted stock units ("RSUs") on March 10, 2026. The company's stock trades under NASDAQ as PTCT.

data.title: Robert Hoglund nominated for election by shareholders to join the Portland General Electric board of directors
data.description: On March 13, 2026 in Portland, Oregon, Robert Hoglund received a nomination from Portland General Electric (NYSE: POR) board of directors to run for election as an independent director at PGE's upcoming 2026 annual shareholder meeting. If approved by PGE shareholders, he will serve a term...

data.title: Stellus Private Credit BDC Reports Results for its Fourth Fiscal Quarter and Year Ended December 31, 2025
data.description: On March 13, 2026, Stellus Private Credit BDC revealed its financial results for the fiscal quarter and year concluding on December 31, 2025. Robert T. Ladd, the CEO of Stellus PBDC, expressed satisfaction with the performance, stating, "We are pleased to report…"

data.title: Inception Growth Acquisition Limited Announces Additional Contribution to Trust Account to Extend Business Combination Period
data.description: On March 12, 2026, Inception Growth Acquisition Limited (NASDAQ: IGTA) deposited $12,203.33 into their Trust Account to extend the deadline for completing a business combination by one month, now extended from March 13, 2026, to April 13, 2026. This move allows the publicly traded special purpose acquisition company more time to finalize a potential merger or acquisition deal.
